tiers.desc: +20% damage, +10% damage taken. Bloodrage on kills.
Bloodrage grants +15% crit for 2 turns. Damage taken penalty reduced to +7%.
+25% damage, +5% taken. Bloodrage chains on kill during Bloodrage.
+25% damage. Deathless Rage: survive killing blow at 1 HP, +50% damage for 3 turns. Once per combat.

guardian.description: -15% damage taken. Taunt: force one enemy to attack you for 2 turns. Allies take 0 damage.

special.description: Force enemies to target you for 2 turns.

tiers.desc: -15% damage taken. Taunt for 2 turns.
-18% damage taken. Taunt reflects 10% damage.
-20% damage taken. Taunting grants 3% HP regen/turn.
-20% taken. Unbreakable: absorb 40% max HP as shield. Once per combat.

warlord.name: Warlord Stance
warlord.description: +10% damage dealt. Battle Cry: buff all allies +20% ATK for 3 turns. Once per combat.

tiers.desc: +10% damage. Battle Cry: +20% ATK to allies for 3 turns.
+12% damage. Battle Cry also grants +10% crit.
+15% damage. Battle Cry lasts 5 turns.
+15% damage. Allies heal 2% HP/turn during Battle Cry. Usable twice.

pyromancy.description: 15% chance to apply burn on damage abilities. Meteor: massive AoE damage, once per combat.

special.name: Meteor
special.description: Rain fire on all enemies for massive damage.

20% burn. Burn damage +50%.
25% burn. Burning enemies take +10% damage from you.
25% burn. Inferno: burning enemies explode, dealing remaining burn to all. Once per combat.

cryomancy.name: Cryomancy
cryomancy.description: 15% chance to apply slow on damage abilities. Flash Freeze: stun all enemies 1 turn, once per combat.

special.name: Flash Freeze
special.description: Freeze all enemies in place for 1 turn.

tiers.desc: 15% slow on hit. Flash Freeze: stun all 1 turn.
20% slow. Slowed enemies have -15% ATK.
25% slow. Flash Freeze 2 turns. Frozen enemies take +15% damage.
25% slow. Absolute Zero: instantly kill non-boss enemies below 15% HP. Once per combat.

arcanistry.description: -20% MP costs on all abilities. Arcane Surge: next 3 abilities cost 0 MP, once per combat.

special.name: Arcane Surge
special.description: Channel pure arcane energy. Next 3 abilities cost 0 MP.

tiers.desc: -20% MP cost. Arcane Surge: 3 free casts.
-25% MP cost. Arcane Surge: 4 free casts.
-30% MP cost. After Surge ends, +20% damage for 3 turns.
-30% MP. Infinite Arcana: 5 turns of 0 MP cost + 15% damage. Once per combat.

radiance.description: Passive 3% HP regen per turn. Divine Restoration: full HP + MP restore, once per combat.

4% HP regen. DR also cleanses all debuffs.
5% HP regen (extends to party). DR auto-triggers at 25% HP.
5% regen. Miracle: auto-revive from death at 50% HP. Once per combat.

+18% damage. Holy Smite also applies burn.

special.description: Coat your blade in deadly venom. All enemies are poisoned.

combos.name: Aftershock
combos.description: War Stomp shakes the ground, empowering Cleave for +30% damage.

combos.name: Shatter
combos.description: Ice Lance freezes the target, Fireball shatters it for +80% damage.

combos.name: Empowered Meteor
combos.description: Arcane Barrier channels power into Meteor for +30% damage.

combos.name: Frozen Conductor
combos.description: Frost Nova makes frozen enemies conduct Chain Lightning for +40% damage.

combos.name: Ambush
combos.description: Cheap Shot stuns, Backstab strikes the exposed target for a guaranteed critical hit.

combos.name: Lethal Dose
combos.description: Poison Blade weakens defenses, Envenom delivers a lethal dose for +50% damage.

combos.name: Shadow Strike
combos.description: Evade creates an opening, Assassinate strikes from the shadows for +40% damage.

combos.name: Divine Judgment
combos.description: Bless empowers Holy Smite into Divine Judgment for +40% damage.

combos.name: Protected Recovery
combos.description: Divine Shield protects while Heal recovers +50% more health.

combos.name: Holy Fire
combos.description: Sacred Flame ignites, Wrath of Light burns with +35% holy fire damage.

combos.name: Focused Barrage
combos.description: Marked Shot tags the target, Twin Shot focuses both arrows for +60% damage.

combos.name: Killzone
combos.description: Bear Trap holds the enemy in place for Volley to rain down +30% damage.

combos.name: Ambush Shot
combos.description: Camouflage conceals you, Explosive Arrow strikes for a guaranteed critical hit.

combos.name: Iron Storm
combos.description: Iron Fortress hardens your blade, Cleave sweeps through with +40% damage and unbreakable resolve.

combos.name: Berserker Onslaught
combos.description: Berserker Rage fuels an unstoppable Warlord's Fury for +60% devastation.

combos.name: Ground Pound
combos.description: Ground Slam staggers enemies, Shield Bash capitalizes with a guaranteed critical strike.

combos.name: Vengeful Wall
combos.description: Steel Wall absorbs punishment, Vengeful Strike channels the pain into +50% retaliatory damage.

combos.name: Arcane Detonation
combos.description: Arcane Missiles destabilize defenses, Pyroblast detonates for +50% explosive damage.

combos.name: Glacial Cascade
combos.description: Glacial Spike freezes the air, Frozen Orb cascades through for +40% shatter damage.

combos.name: Temporal Nova
combos.description: Temporal Shift bends time, Supernova erupts across all timelines for +50% annihilation.

combos.name: Mana Overload
combos.description: Mana Surge overcharges your reserves, Arcane Torrent unleashes +60% raw arcane power.

combos.name: Death Sentence
combos.description: Death Mark condemns the target, Assassinate executes the sentence for +60% lethal damage.

combos.name: Venom Rush
combos.description: Envenom coats your weapons, Blade Flurry spreads venom with every strike for +40% toxic damage.

combos.name: Shadow Ambush
combos.description: Vanish into shadows, Death From Above strikes unseen for a guaranteed critical with +30% bonus.

combos.name: Crippling Finish
combos.description: Crippling Poison weakens defenses, Disembowel tears through for +50% damage to the helpless target.

combos.name: Radiant Wrath
combos.description: Radiance blinds the enemy, Retribution channels divine fury for +50% holy damage.

combos.name: Sanctified Strike
combos.description: Prayer of Mending sanctifies your next attack, Smite Evil deals +35% damage and heals +30% more.

combos.name: Divine Fortress
combos.description: Sanctuary creates sacred ground, Archangel descends with +50% amplified healing to all.

combos.name: Holy Cascade
combos.description: Holy Fire ignites divine wrath, Divine Storm cascades holy energy for +50% damage to all enemies.

combos.name: Nature's Fury
combos.description: Nature's Wrath calls the wild, Barrage channels primal fury for +50% damage.

combos.name: Sniper Ambush
combos.description: Eagle Eye locks the target, Sniper Shot delivers a guaranteed critical with +30% precision damage.

combos.name: Entangled Rain
combos.description: Entangling Roots holds enemies in place, Arrow Rain showers +50% damage on the trapped targets.

combos.name: Avatar Strike
combos.description: Aspect of the Hawk sharpens your senses, Avatar of Nature strikes with +40% primal devastation.
